main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling first stage + TOC/ATP + reduced UF + temperature + FeCl3' — captura múltiples factores.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir FeCl3 a 0.8 + continua low-dose + CIP alcalino bio-dispersante — completo.

requested_data.justification: Pide membrane autopsy report — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: autopsy >50% inorgánico OR ΔP no decrece 30% → switch.
